samples:
I took a boat across the ocean
And I came to this land on time
When I left my home, I was sad
But now I'm smiling all the time


These people are so cold and mean
They sell illusions of perfection
Desire for quick success, they preach
No pain, no shame, no sacrifice

The sun is shining through the trees
I can feel the warmth upon my skin
The grass is growing in the shade
Of enormous red-and-goldened leaves


On high places deep within myself
My soul has found the reasons why
You're taking care of me, you heal me
I need no medicine at all

I find myself so far away from here
Inside there burns an endless flame
This love is too strong, it makes me crazy
Don't understand how I could be so lame
A giant door opens into another world
There runs a river made of light
It always flows on time
In this place beyond space

And the time has come to say goodbye
But I'll never forget your name
So long, so long


Now a part of me goes, "Leave you alone"
A part of me goes, "Cry"
Another one says, "Come back when you grow up"
Other one cries for you, "Let's see what we can do"


The silence is deafening, all around
And all along our way
You had to learn how to let go
Of everything that hurt before and after
No need to cry for help
Even if it feels like this forever


I have always tried my best to make you understand
That things will be all right in no time
I have seen your face on the ground
Lost all hope, life ain't fair to you
Please, rise from where you lay
My love for you is alive


Now I know what it means to die
And yet I feel there's something left inside
There once was light, now there's only dark
No words can describe what happened here
I opened doors to nothingness

And I run, cannot see the light
I'm falling down, and my head explodes


When you lie awake all night, just to get some sleep
You start to count the tears that flow from your eyes
Are we dying? Are we rising high again?
Will we ever learn how to speak about what matters most?


We are a race of mortals; it doesn't last forever
We try our best not to cry, but don't get out of there

This land is burning; no one cares if we die
On this altar made of stones, we kill the world
No greener pasture grows in sight
The rivers are on fire


Wake up now, open your eyes and see
It's so clear: life isn't meant to be abused
For every soul that comes into being
There stands another ready to replace
Let us grow old together, hand in hand
Overcome the pain, embrace the world
In order to find true happiness, let us first
Restore what has been lost


My vision is blurred, I can feel my heart is collapsing
All the trees have fallen, the oceans dry, my mind exploding

This world is so cold to me
I don't think I could ever try this again


The pain, it cannot be healed
My brain explodes with the noise of blood
But my will is still strong
And I want to change myself for good
Burn in flame until the end


Ashes to ashes
I find myself underground
A fire under the ground burns inside
It knows that nothing can last forever
And all things change and die

Change, change, change, change
You're changing


Take a look from up here
See how clear you can see through time
So many generations have come and gone
All gone!
From up here...

When I leave, I know where I go
And no one else knows now where I am
Change, change, change, change


Ashes to ashes
I find myself underground
A fire under the ground burns inside
It knows that nothing can last forever
And all things change and die

Change, change, change, change
You're changing

Out to sea, you drift and tumble
You don't belong up there
You have no sense of direction
And you are all alone


Gone now is your strength and will
The only way out now is this one
Dive in the open ocean blue
Swim away from where you've been lost


All life begins on land
But it's so clear that you belong out here


Life cannot be ruled by fate
There's a secret code you need to crack
It goes beyond what meets the eye
It starts inside, down deep


Come back to shore, find yourself first
Leave behind these troubled waters
All ships have found their ways back
Please accept my word for granted

If I may call you son of man
I know you face some trouble
So go out, leave your fears behind
Learn how to dive in this vast open space
Just follow those instructions
My dream became reality
Now let me tell you what to do
Just put your feet on solid ground

Now, I'm standing here, frozen in time
I am paralyzed, by the sight of these visions


The bridge is down and I see it burning to the ground
And no one knows where this fire begins or ends


Leave all your fears behind, let it blow away
We will overcome what kills us and makes us cry
Feel the heat rising from below, we are on fire
But when we strike, there is a roar in our bones
A light on high for those who know how to reach it
You can feel its presence growing strong inside
Inexhaustible strength of soul, fire unyielding
Babel d'escaliers et d'arcades

When you're walking through the valley of tears
All along the way you fight against fate
Surviving the pain of life, learning how to heal yourself
This river flows through the empty space
Between rock solid mountains made of silence
From up here you can see the valleys below


Leave all your fears behind, let them blow away
We will overcome what kills us and makes us cry
Feel the heat rising from below, we are on fire
But when we strike, there is a roar in our bones
A light on high for those who know how to reach it
You can feel its presence growing strong inside
Inexhaustible strength of soul, fire unyielding

The world is on fire
I'm standing in the rain
Of lies and propaganda
Wash my face, make me clean


Infected by the pressure
Can't get up off the ground
My mind is gone out of sight
No hope for redemption now


And I pray to God that he will hear my cries
Cleanse away this bloodletting from inside
Make it right, set me free
Unsuspected torture of the soul
Am I alone? Can't stand it no more


All I want to do
Is find myself again
Free my spirit from all the pain
You take a part of me away
But you don't destroy my mind
When I see your face
I just can't believe what I've been through


Leave behind all illusions, delusions
Overcome with power
Find a new way to be strong
Face reality, let the tears flow
Break out into silence


Let us stay awake
Until dawn breaks

Out for revenge, I'll fight to the end
I will strike with a vengeance


All the pain and misery of this world
I refuse to believe in what I see
They try to destroy me but they won't
Kill my soul forever


And now I come for your life
You all will pay for what you did


The day has come, the time has come
It is finally here


All the fools have their eyes shut
How dare they tell us how to live?
They think that I don't know any better
That I cannot understand
My inner being is on fire
With shame and hatred boiling inside
If I should die right now, I will die again
But first, I want to take a life


And now I come for your life
You all will pay for what you did
So long it took us to find our ground
Finally we are free


I hate these words so much
All wrong, confusion
Words mean nothing if you lie

A flame that is constant
Is my guiding light through the night
And a fire burning inside
I feel like I'm alive


The flames cannot see me, but they know me
They protect me from all evil
No fear to have dreams and no need to explain myself
To those who mock what you do best


Can I trust in this vision? No one else can see it
But my soul knows it's true
My heart beating for life, desire, devotion
Can I believe it comes true?


Overwhelming power of love and power
Cannot control your arms extended
You set me on fire, make me fly so high
By the force of truth unveiled


All illusions are gone now, everything is over
Only this light remains
My attention turned to only one thing
Life itself, there's nothing left to say


It came at last…
Now come all…

All illusions are gone now, everything is over
Only this light remains

Your words so cold
Emptiness inside
You're not alone you'll find the truth
So clear to me, my child
This poison in your veins
And hate for all that lives
But I don't fear, I want to see
I just have one question
You take what you can get from life
It seems that nothing matters
And no, I don't recall your name
The price is too high now
Let it flow out of you


No, there is something else inside you
That makes you wanna scream and run away
There is a flame alive in your heart
Just let it grow, stay strong and proud
And if you dive into yourself
Forget about everything
When you arrive where you belong
I just bow down and pray
Let it grow, stay strong and proud
When we are old, our pride will go
But until then stay on this side
Leave the world behind and burn


Open your eyes, look at us
See the flames of love
If only you could feel this power
So bright, so warm...
